# Endpoint Catalog

Per-category reference for every REST endpoint, generated from the dbt
manifest: descriptions, columns, declared filters, pagination and sort
contracts, and ready-to-run examples. For free-text search use the
[Metrics Explorer](../explorer.md). Every endpoint here is backed by a dbt
model — see the [dbt Model Catalog](../../models/index.md) for the
model-side view of the same data.
